epigraph: “The early morning has gold in its mouth.” — Franklin

messages.preview: I have the actual king quote. Will send asap
Thanks for sharing mate. Do you have an email contact for Terry Peters which you could share? Or intro me via email. Was having a lovely cha
“Bombing it” may not have been the best choice of phrase 😂
Thinking about Thursday photos… what are we wearing? Might be too tight to get a tee done for me now?
Thanks matey. Bare with me as car gone capput so having to train cross country to look at new on today. Will try to have a read en route x

tasks.text: Brian. Book meeting Prep for Caroline
Get testimonial quote from CEO of Parkinson's UK (on-on-one in two weeks).

lead.headline: Teresa's resignation requires urgent handling before the day escalates.
lead.deck: This personnel matter sits unaddressed among your tasks with no due date assigned, yet it's the kind of issue that compounds quickly without immediate action. You need to establish next steps and communication strategy before end of business today.
